name: Llama 2 7B Chat
note: RLHF dialogue-tuned Llama 2 7B; 4K context; MMLU 45.3, far behind later Llama generations.

results.notes: 5-shot, reported for Llama-2-7b-chat-hf [relabeled self-reported: aggregator/press relay of a vendor figure, not an independent re-measurement] [Corrected during full-corpus audit: The existing entry was labeled 'self-reported' and sourced to a telnyx.com aggregator page, but Meta's own official model card/paper (confirmed by direct fetch) never publishes an MMLU score for the RLHF fine-tuned Llama-2-7b-chat model — only for the base pretrained 7B, whose MMLU is exactly 45.3. That figure was mislabeled: it's the base model's number, not an independent measurement of the chat]

GPT-4-judged MT-Bench average for meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-chat-hf, per the EQ-Bench paper's Table 3 (citing the LMSYS Chatbot Arena/MT-Bench leaderboard). Independently corroborated by telnyx.com/llm-library/llama-2-7b-chat-hf, which separately states 'MT Bench: 6.27' for this exact model.
EU21-MMLU, Thellmann et al. 2024, Table 13 ('Meta-Llama-2-7B-Chat'). Matches this catalog entry's linked meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-chat-hf.
Reported as meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-chat-hf, exact hf match. Shaberi eval framework Rakuda test, GPT-4-judged 0-10 scale.
ARC-Challenge, 25-shot, meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-chat-hf. HuggingFace Open LLM Leaderboard v1 (2023-09-04 run). Cross-corroborated at llm-explorer.com/model/meta-llama%2FLlama-2-7b-chat-hf (ARC 52.9).
HellaSwag, 10-shot, meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-chat-hf. HuggingFace Open LLM Leaderboard v1 (2023-09-04 run). Cross-corroborated at llm-explorer.com (HellaSwag 78.6).

TruthfulQA MC2, 0-shot, meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-chat-hf, from a mirrored snapshot of the HuggingFace Open LLM Leaderboard v1 (2023-09-04 run). This benchmark slug was not previously tracked for this model (Meta's own model card never publishes TruthfulQA for the chat fine-tune).

GSM8K, 5-shot (harness|gsm8k|5), acc 0.0735, from the official archived HuggingFace Open LLM Leaderboard v1 per-model results JSON for meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-chat-hf. Cross-corroborated (7.4) at llm-explorer.com.
Winogrande, 5-shot (harness|winogrande|5), acc 0.7174, from the official archived HuggingFace Open LLM Leaderboard v1 per-model results JSON for meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-chat-hf.
DROP, 3-shot (harness|drop|3), F1 13.09 (EM 6.76), from the official archived HuggingFace Open LLM Leaderboard v1 per-model results JSON for meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-chat-hf.
Arena-Hard-Auto v0.1 score (GPT-4-Turbo judge) for llama-2-7b-chat-hf, from the LMSYS 'Arena-Hard Pipeline' launch blog post's leaderboard table (95% CI -0.8/+0.8).

verificationNotes: Confirmed existence and 2023-07-18 release via Meta/HF. Directly fetched telnyx.com/llm-library/llama-2-7b-chat-hf: both cited numbers (MMLU 45.3, Arena Elo 1037) literally appear on the page as text ('scores 45.3% on MMLU (5-shot)' and Arena Elo 1037), so both rows kept. Note: the same page also shows a separate spec-table MMLU figure of 45.8 elsewhere, an internal inconsistency on telnyx's own page, but the 45.3 figure is literally present and matches Meta's own reported base-model number, so it was not dropped.
